title: Cambridge University Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
body: Cambridge University Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust is an NHS foundation trust located in Cambridge, England. The Trust provides healthcare for people in the Cambridge area, in eastern England, and specialist services such as transplantation, treatment of rare cancers and neurological intensive care for a much wider area.  It is located on the Cambridge Biomedical Campus and runs Addenbrooke's Hospital and the Rosie Hospital. It is a member of the Shelford Group, an informal organisation of ten leading English university teaching hospitals.
